data.title: Modular Web Components
data.description: Implementation of modular components to enhance flexibility and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes web components and shadow DOM to isolate component styles and functionality.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures optimal presentation on various devices through flexible grids and layouts.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries and grid/flexbox layout techniques.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Global CDN to efficiently deliver web content to users based on their geographic location.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Azure CDN for low-latency content distribution.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decomposition of services into small, independent components to enhance deployability and scaling.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Kubernetes and Docker for container orchestration.

data.title: API-Driven Interactions
data.description: Utilizes RESTful and GraphQL APIs to power dynamically fetched content.
data.technical_spec: APIs are versioned and documented, enabling third-party integrations.
